sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, original_string VARCHAR, normalized_string VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string, normalized_string) VALUES (1, 'ardèch', nfc_normalize('ardèch'));
UPDATE test_strings SET normalized_string = nfc_normalize(original_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_string, normalized_string FROM test_strings WHERE normalized_string = nfc_normalize('ardech');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE original_string <> normalized_string;
